title: 二元性状
effectDetails: 昼夜交替强化：Equinox 的另一半身将解放 10 秒，并造成 300% 的伤害。
tipKeywords: 与同类效果的叠加方式

provenance.excerpt: Can be acquired by attaining the rank of Maxim under the Arbiters of Hexis , or the rank of Flawless under New Loka , and spending 25,000 Standing 25,000 to purchase.
The duration of the specter is affected by Ability Duration .
The damage output of the specter is not affected by Ability Strength .
The specter is an allied NPC that copies the weapon Equinox had equipped before casting Metamorphosis , and uses it to autonomously attack enemies.
Only one Duality specter from the player can exist at a time. If Metamorphosis is cast again before the specter's duration expires, the specter will die immediately before a new specter is spawned.
The specter is counted as a summon and is affected by Summoner's Wrath , Arcane Camisado , and Theorem Infection .
Summoner's Wrath acts as a faction damage bonus , stacking multiplicatively with the damage bonus from Duality and additively with faction damage mods on the specter's equipped weapon.
The specter will not use Warframe Abilities .
The specter will not swap between different weapons.
On weapons with an Alternate Fire mode, only the primary mode will be used.
Weapons with multiple modes, like Kuva Hind and Hystrix , will always be used in the mode that they start the mission in, regardless of which mode is being used before casting Metamorphosis.
The specter cannot use incarnon modes of weapons. However, the normal mode will benefit from relevant incarnon perks.
The specter is considered to be aiming down sights for the purpose of most weapon effects, such as AX-52 's passive.
Sniper rifles are an exception as they will always be considered to be hip-fired, incurring the hip-fire accuracy penalty on sniper rifles.
The specter has slightly reduced accuracy (most obvious on perfectly accurate weapons like Dera Vandal ).
The specter has its own magazine for ammo, but will deplete the player's ammo reserves upon reloading .
However, the specter can reload for a full magazine even if there is 0 ammo reserve left.
Since the specter only consumes ammo upon reloading, if it dies before it can finish the reload animation (e.g., Metamorphosis is cast again), no ammo will be consumed from the ammo reserve.
The specter will sometimes intentionally collect ammo drops for the player, which restore the player's ammo reserve.
The specter has a targeting range of 150 meters; it will not attack enemies further away than this even if it has line of sight to them.

Similarly, even if enemies are within this range, if the specter cannot detect them via its senses, the specter can end up in states where it will neither seek nor attack enemies; the specter can even forget about enemies that it has already attacked if it can no longer see them due to terrain.
The specter will teleport to the player if it is more than 50 meters away for 5 seconds and not currently in combat.
Kills made by the specter contributes to Warframe affinity and has no effect on weapon affinity.
The specter's health, shields, energy max, and other base stats will mimic Equinox or Equinox Prime's, and can be boosted by mods and other bonuses.

Sprint speed is an exception. The specter will always have Equinox's base sprint speed of 1.15 , unaffected by sprint speed increases. However, it will be affected by movement speed bonuses such as Arcane Camisado or Speed .

The specter also has 200 base armor, rather than Equinox's 135 or Equinox Prime's 160 . This is actually due to the 200 armor minimum for non-player units. Armor bonuses like Steel Fiber on the specter will scale with this value rather than Equinox's own armor.

The specter inherits effects from many different sources on the player's loadout, primarily Mods equipped on Equinox and her weapons, but also some Arcanes , Archon Shards , weapon passives, and Incarnon perks.
Permanent / passive stat bonuses will always apply to the specter, such as Arcane Expertise , Serration , and Azure Shard buffs.
Permanent unique effects will usually apply to the specter, such as Reflection , Arcane Ice , or Primary Acuity .

Temporary bonuses will not be applied to the specter, such as Adaptation , Galvanized Mods , and Primary Merciless . However, any permanent bonuses from these sources will still work on the specter, such as the permanent 80% Multishot on Galvanized Chamber or the 30% Reload Speed on Primary Merciless.
The specter can trigger certain temporary bonuses for the player, but the specter itself will not benefit from them, such as Arcane Fury and Arcane Trickery .

Conditional effects will sometimes apply to the specter if their buff does not have a limited duration, but instead activates and deactivates when a condition is met. For example, Cascadia Overcharge will take effect any time the specter has overshields, and Hata-Satya will stack up its bonus until the specter reloads.

The specter does not inherit any self-only buffs like Xata's Whisper that Equinox had on her before the specter was spawned, nor does the specter copy any self-only buffs that are cast while the specter is active. However, AoE buffs like Roar or Warcry can be applied to the specter by casting them while the specter is active.
Evensong 's 7 forced Puncture procs will not be applied from shots fired by the specter.
The specter works somewhat differently with melee weapons compared to guns:
The specter's 3x damage multiplier does not apply to melee weapons (bug). Instead, it will receive the +700% stealth damage bonus, regardless of enemies being aware of Equinox or the specter itself.

As the stealth damage bonus stacks additively with critical damage, critical hits are less valuable for the specter. For example, a weapon with 3x critical damage will deal 8x damage on a stealth attack and 10x on a critical stealth attack.
The specter will only perform the neutral combo of whatever stance is equipped on the weapon.
The specter does have its own combo counter. It does not copy the player's current combo count when spawned, instead spawning with 0 combo count.
Is affected by initial combo, combo count chance, and combo duration bonuses.
Combo scaling mods such as Blood Rush and Weeping Wounds do not work on the specter, despite it having a combo count.

The specter may perform heavy attacks on low health enemies, specifically when they are within the mercy kill threshold. The heavy attack's damage will scale with the specter's current combo count, and deplete its combo count afterwards.
Is affected by heavy attack efficiency and heavy attack wind-up speed bonuses.
Cannot trigger Tennokai.
Can trigger various unique heavy attack effects from weapons like Syam or Zenistar .

Will perform repeated heavy attacks against enemies blinded by certain sources, specifically Radial Blind and Blinding Reave . Other blinds will not trigger this behavior, including Desiccation and Breach Surge .
The specter will perform ground finishers on knocked down enemies.
Is affected by finisher damage bonuses.
The specter will attempt to block incoming attacks from in front of it while approaching enemies.
Can benefit from the increased critical damage from Cold procs and critical chance from Puncture procs, as it deals weapon damage instead of ability damage.
If the specter wields a sniper rifle , it will spawn with 0 sniper combo but be able to build up combo by landing shots, taking advantage of the sniper damage multiplier in the process.

The specter can benefit from the Condition Overload effects of Cedo , Secondary Shiver , Condition Overload , and incarnon perks (such as Burston incarnon's Fatal Affliction). However Galvanized Aptitude , Galvanized Shot , and Galvanized Savvy cannot be triggered by the specter.
Guns with additive CO will have the CO damage bonus not be affected by the clone's 3x damage multiplier, giving the CO bonus reduced effectiveness.

For example on Cedo, each pellet deals 30 damage normally, so 90 for the clone. With Cedo's innate +60% damage per status, an enemy with 3 statuses should take 90 * (1 + 0.6 * 3) = 90 * 2.8 = 252 damage. Instead, they will only take 90 + 30 * (0.6 * 3) = 90 + 30 * 1.8 = 144 damage. The CO bonus scales with 30 damage rather than 90.
Guns with multiplicative CO will behave multiplicatively as expected, with the specter getting the full effectiveness.
Condition Overload on melee weapons will correctly apply additively (to normal swings) or multiplicatively (to certain projectiles), getting the full effect in both scenarios.

If a Gear item such as a Codex Scanner or Archgun Deployer is equipped when Metamorphosis is cast, the specter will spawn with the equipped Primary Weapon, regardless of which weapon was most recently used. If no Primary Weapon is equipped, then the specter will spawn with the equipped Secondary Weapon. If no Primary or Secondary Weapon is equipped, then the specter will spawn with the equipped Melee weapon.
The specter will gradually take damage if it walks within range of a Nullifier Bubble or a Nul Comba / Scrambus aura.
